observedKnowledge.intendedUse: Demo-mined routes, aim anchors, pauses, plant spots, post-plant holds, and retake sequences should be added here with support counts and confidence.

normativeConstraints.description: Agents must start and move on legal map nav areas.
Run speed, walk speed, jump-up, step-up, and drop thresholds bound movement without prescribing tactics.
Aim should reference enemy, last-seen, contact, route, site, bomb, or retake state instead of arbitrary wall directions.
Bomb scenarios must terminate with T or CT through plant, defuse, timeout, explosion, or elimination rules.

policy.normativeUse: Normative entries may reject impossible or obviously non-realistic behavior; they must not be treated as a unique correct tactical style.
policy.overrideRule: Observed demo knowledge with sufficient support should override normative seed priors for style, route, aim, and timing choices.
